Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers can
understand and verify your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456". Remove if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Tests / CI

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe the tests you ran or added. Include sample METAR/TAF inputs where
relevant so reviewers can reproduce.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have read and will follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] My code follows the project's style (`ruff format`, `ruff check`).
- [ ] `mypy` and `pytest` pass locally.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my
      feature works.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if the
      change is user-visible.
